expectations.text: Uses the HuggingFace URL directly as the source field (no file upload needed)
expectations.evidence: "source": "https://huggingface.co/myorg/domain-lora" passed directly; comment says 'HuggingFace URL — no upload needed'
requests.post(f"{api_url}/v0/models", ...) used to create the model
wait_for_validation() function polls GET /v0/models/{name} until status is 'active' or 'error'
